TestCase z22Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_k = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_k, t1.k, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.k = follow_case_k;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Clip each element to the range [0.0, 1.0]
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.k[i] < 0.0) {
            follow_case.k[i] = 0.0;
        } else if (follow_case.k[i] > 1.0) {
            follow_case.k[i] = 1.0;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
